text.tspan: Your authentic Roman Carbonara is complete. The emulsion holds, the silk clings to the
rigatoni, and the kitchen smells of
. There is no cream. There is no regret.
in warm bowls — carbonara waits for no one, and the sauce sets as it cools.
, extra Pecorino, and a final crack of fresh black pepper.
